description: Composition Dark navy blue jeans made of cotton and spandex blend fabric, that has two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with thread detailing, brand tab appliqued on the right pocket at the back and metal zipper and button closure Fit Mid-rise, Regular fit, Straight leg Wash care Machine wash cold Wash separately using mild detergent Do not bleach Turn inside out before washing and drying Use warm iron Do not wring Tumble dry or flat Dry in shade If you're a denim person, these navy blue jeans from wrangler are perfect for you. Mid-rise, with a great regular fit, this pair looks on trend and stays comfortable all day. Team this with funky t-shirts and canvas shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The model wears trousers of length 44" Height: 6', Waist: 32", Hips: 40"
